text_original:
1 There he is gathering the dolichos !
A day without seeing him
Is like three months !

2 There he is gathering the oxtail-southernwood !
A day without seeing him
Is like three seasons !

3 There he is gathering the mugwort !
A day without seeing him
Is like three years !
text_normalized:
1 There he is gathering the dolichos !
A day without seeing him
Is like three months !

2 There he is gathering the oxtail-southernwood !
A day without seeing him
Is like three seasons !

3 There he is gathering the mugwort !
A day without seeing him
Is like three years !
